Thought 4: The murder was committed with a vial of acid. Addison has direct access to acid through his home chemistry set and admits to bringing acid to the gym. He also had a strong motive (Uma discovered his theft) and was present at the gym during the murder. Irving had a motive (plagiarism exposure) and was at the gym late at night, but no evidence links him to acid. The method of murder (acid) strongly points to Addison, given his background and access. Therefore, Addison is the most likely murderer.
